<!-- Thanks for contributing! Fill out the checklist below. -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes in this PR? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New deck
- [ ] Edit to existing deck (typo / accuracy / clarity)
- [ ] Card additions / removals / reordering
- [ ] Deck or topic rename
- [ ] Schema or tooling change
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Pre-flight checklist

- [ ] Path follows `topics/<topic-slug>/<deck-slug>.yml`.
- [ ] Topic slug exists in `topics.json` — or there is a merged "New Topic Request" issue.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_layout.py` locally and it passes.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_yaml.py` locally and it passes.
- [ ] Card prose has been proofread.

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to. -->
